message: components/ folder found at the project root instead of src/components/
suggestion: Move components/ inside src/ — the standard React convention is src/components/ for all reusable UI components.
Consider organising source files under a src/ directory for cleaner separation from config files at the root.

message: Custom hooks (use*.ts/tsx) found outside a dedicated hooks/ directory
suggestion: Group all custom hooks in src/hooks/ (or hooks/) to make them easy to discover and test.

message: CSS/SCSS files are scattered across the project rather than grouped
suggestion: Consolidate styles under src/styles/ or co-locate them with their component (e.g., Component.module.css) for maintainability.
